channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Large amount of litter, 16th July
item.description:
Please clear along the road here, including on the road by the curb
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Kilburn Lane, Kilburn, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.category: Fly-tip Small - Less than one bag

item.title: Pavement collapsing by side of telecommunications cover, 15th July
item.description:
It has been here a while and is getting bigger. It’s outside 55 Chevening Road, SE19 3TD
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 57, Chevening Road, Upper Norwood, Greater London

item.title: Graffiti on wall, 15th July
item.description:
Please clean off

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 20, Nutt Street, Peckham, Greater London

item.title: Dog fouling and litter around plant area outside flats, 15th July
item.description:
Outside lark house there are small areas of grass and plants. People are letting their dogs foul there and also litter is being constantly blown or thrown there. Street cleaners are not monitoring this area
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Powell Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bin liner fu of dog faeces outside CobourgNatureArea, 15th July
item.description:
Been there blocking the pavement for 8 days. Stinks and is right outside where we bring 2-4 yr olds to play. Absolutely disgusting.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cobourg Road Estate, Old Kent Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bins and kegs placed outside of the allocated space for the pub, 15th July
item.description:
The establishment in question frequently places large commercial waste bins and beer kegs directly on the public footpath. They places customer tables on a driveway that is clearly marked with double yellow lines, well outside the licensed boundary.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Goldsmiths Row, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Corner between Rosa’s Thai and the crêperie, 15th July
item.description:
Open manhole/drain in curb of pavement. Extremely dangerous - someone has already fallen in.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 152, West End Lane, West Hampstead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Shopping trolleys filled with all sorts, including fridge, 15th July
item.description:
.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bird in Bush Road, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 17b, 15th July
item.description:
I checked to see, if this report was online for an inspection. It was reported in Sept 2025. The actual report states ' fixed'. The pavement is in fact got worse and again I had an accident on it. Luckily not too bad. Please can this hazard be fixed, before our health & safety are severely compromised
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Plympton Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Paint spill outside Leyland and pizza express on Notting Hill Gate Road, 15th July
item.description:
Paint spill outside Leyland and pizza express on Notting Hill Gate Road. Likely from the paint shop. Cameras should be able to check and charge back this mess

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 137, Notting Hill Gate, Notting Hill, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping at Kimmeridge Road recycling centre, 15th July
item.description:
Flytipping at Kimmeridge Road recycling centre yet again. Please consider CCTV and enforcement.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Langdon Road, Widmore, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead end signs need replacing., 15th July
item.description:
Both dead end signs on Langdon Road are worn and require replacement.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Langdon Road, Widmore, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Part of a mirrored wardrobe on the pavement, 15th July
item.description:
It has been there 3 days
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Thicket Road, Crystal Palace, Greater London
